'''fanguku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oenochemistry|oenochemistry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oenochemistry|oenochemistry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fanguku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fængikith|fængikith]] || [[word:fængikij|fængikij]] || [[word:fængikish|fængikish]] || [[word:fængiki|fængiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fangungukuth|fangungukuth]] || [[word:fangungukuj|fangungukuj]] || [[word:fangungukush|fangungukush]] || [[word:fangunguku|fangunguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fangukuth|fangukuth]] || [[word:fangukuj|fangukuj]] || [[word:fangukush|fangukush]] || [[word:fanguku|fanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fangufkuth|fangufkuth]] || [[word:fangufkuj|fangufkuj]] || [[word:fangufkush|fangufkush]] || [[word:fangufkuf|fangufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fangukuthu|fangukuthu]] || [[word:fangukuju|fangukuju]] || [[word:fangukushu|fangukushu]] || [[word:fangukuku|fangukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fangukuth|fangukuth]] || [[word:fangukuj|fangukuj]] || [[word:fangukush|fangukush]] || [[word:fanguku|fanguku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fangukuthul|fangukuthul]] || [[word:fangukujul|fangukujul]] || [[word:fangukushul|fangukushul]] || [[word:fangukukul|fangukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fangukuthuthu|fangukuthuthu]] || [[word:fangukujuju|fangukujuju]] || [[word:fangukushushu|fangukushushu]] || [[word:fangukuku|fangukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fangukuthun|fangukuthun]] || [[word:fangukujun|fangukujun]] || [[word:fangukushun|fangukushun]] || [[word:fangukukun|fangukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fangukuthuoro|fangukuthuoro]] || [[word:fangukujuoro|fangukujuoro]] || [[word:fangukushuoro|fangukushuoro]] || [[word:fangukukuoro|fangukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
